title: calibrachoa calycina
intro: Calibrachoa calycina, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Solanaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities that can aid in wound healing. The health benefits of Calibrachoa calycina include reducing anxiety and stress, while also exhibiting antioxidant properties that can protect against cell damage. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
